name: SEED - Sharing and Enabling Environmental Data (NSW)
operator: NSW Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water
dataType: Environmental spatial data, biodiversity, soils, land cover
description: NSW central environmental data portal providing biodiversity, soils, land capability and land cover datasets for New South Wales.

name: DataVic - Victorian Government Open Data
dataType: Multi-thematic spatial data including Vicmap foundational layers
description: Victoria's open data portal hosting Vicmap foundational spatial datasets plus environment, water, energy, transport, and land-use layers.

name: QSpatial - Queensland Spatial Catalogue
dataType: Cadastre, topography, imagery, environment, water, mining
description: Queensland's spatial data catalogue providing download and web service access to cadastre, topography, imagery and environment datasets from 11 state agencies.

name: SLIP - Shared Location Information Platform (WA)
dataType: Property, roads, infrastructure, environment, natural resources
description: Western Australia's multi-agency spatial platform delivering property, infrastructure, environment and natural resource data from over 25 state agencies via Landgate.

name: SARIG - South Australian Resources Information Gateway
operator: South Australia Department of Energy and Mining
dataType: Geology, geophysics, mineral tenements, petroleum, groundwater
description: South Australia's geoscience data gateway providing geology, geophysics, mineral tenement boundaries, 3D geological models and exploration reports.

name: LIST - Land Information System Tasmania
operator: Land Tasmania (Dept. of Natural Resources and Environment)
dataType: Property, cadastre, topography, environment, planning zones
description: Tasmania's whole-of-government land information system providing over 3100 spatial datasets through LISTmap and LISTdata portals.

name: ABARES Spatial Data - Agricultural and Land Use
operator: Australian Bureau of Agricultural and Resource Economics and Sciences
dataType: Land use, land cover change, agricultural commodities, forestry
description: Australia's national agricultural research bureau providing continental land use maps, forestry spatial data, crop statistics and Indigenous estate boundaries.

name: ABS Geographic Data Service (ASGS)
dataType: Statistical area boundaries (Mesh Blocks to national), census geography
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoTIFF, CSV, KML, PNG
description: Australian statistical geography boundaries from mesh blocks to national level, updated each census cycle, with web services and ABS Maps visualisation.

name: AusSeabed - Marine Bathymetry Data Portal
dataType: Multibeam bathymetry, backscatter, sidescan sonar, AusBathyTopo compilations
description: Australia's national seabed mapping coordination program providing multibeam bathymetry surveys and national-scale AusBathyTopo compilations for the Australian EEZ.

name: Australian Antarctic Data Centre (AADC)
dataType: Antarctic and subantarctic environmental, biological, glaciological data
description: Long-term repository for Australia's Antarctic research data including spatial datasets, map catalogues and subantarctic island observations since 1996.

name: eAtlas - AIMS Marine Data Portal
dataType: Coral reef surveys, seagrass, bathymetry, water quality, species distribution
description: AIMS environmental research atlas and data repository for the Great Barrier Reef and tropical Australia, with long-term monitoring program data since 1992.

name: Stats NZ Geographic Data Service
dataType: Statistical area boundaries (meshblock to national), census geography
description: New Zealand's official statistical geographic boundary service providing meshblock to regional boundaries, census data layers and Maori constituency boundaries.

name: LRIS Portal - Land Resource Information System
dataType: Soils, land use capability, land cover (LCDB), land environments (LENZ)
spatialResolution: varies (15 m LCDB to regional soil maps)
description: Landcare Research's geospatial portal hosting over 200 land resource layers for New Zealand including national soils, LCDB land cover and LENZ environments.

name: MfE Data Service - Ministry for the Environment
operator: Ministry for the Environment / Manatū Mō Te Taiao
dataType: Land use (LUCAS), climate projections, freshwater, air quality, contaminated sites
description: New Zealand's environmental data service providing LUCAS land use maps, climate projections, freshwater quality and contaminated site datasets.

name: DOC Open Spatial Data - Department of Conservation
operator: Department of Conservation / Te Papa Atawhai
dataType: Public conservation land, tracks, huts, campsites, marine reserves, species
description: New Zealand Department of Conservation's open geospatial portal providing conservation land boundaries, tracks, huts, campsites and marine reserve datasets in NZTM.

name: Canterbury Maps - Regional Geospatial Portal
operator: Environment Canterbury and Canterbury District Councils
dataType: Regional planning, hazards, property, infrastructure, environment
description: Collaborative regional geospatial portal aggregating spatial data from 11 Canterbury district and regional councils for planning, hazards and infrastructure.

name: Papua New Guinea National Fisheries Authority
dataType: Fisheries management zones, catch data, species distribution, marine boundaries
description: Papua New Guinea's fisheries authority providing management plans, catch statistics and marine zone data for tuna, reef fish and lobster fisheries.

name: PNG Mineral Resources Authority - Geology and Mineral Data
operator: Mineral Resources Authority / Geological Survey of PNG
dataType: Geology maps, geophysics, mineral tenements, geochemistry, exploration reports
description: PNG Geological Survey providing geology maps, aeromagnetic and radiometric data, mineral tenement boundaries and over 900,000 geochemical point records.

name: PNG Environment Data Portal (SPREP)
operator: SPREP / PNG Conservation and Environment Protection Authority
dataType: Biodiversity, climate, land use, protected areas, water resources
description: Papua New Guinea's national environment data portal under the SPREP Inform network, hosting biodiversity, climate, land use and conservation datasets.

name: Fiji Meteorological and Hydrological Services
dataType: Weather observations, climate records, rainfall, cyclone tracks, ENSO outlooks
description: Fiji's national meteorological service providing weather forecasts, historical climate data, cyclone tracking and ENSO seasonal outlooks for Fiji and the wider Pacific.

name: Fiji Environment Data Portal (SPREP)
dataType: Coastal, marine, biodiversity, climate vulnerability, waste, water
description: Fiji's national environment data portal under the SPREP Inform network, hosting coastal, marine, biodiversity and climate vulnerability datasets.

name: Pacific Data Hub (PDH)
dataType: Multi-thematic data catalogue covering 22 Pacific Island nations
description: SPC's central data infrastructure cataloguing and publishing datasets across 22 Pacific Island nations with PacificMap geospatial exploration tool.

name: PacificMap - SPC Geospatial Viewer
dataType: Spatial data layers for 22 Pacific Island Countries and Territories
description: Map-based exploration tool for Pacific spatial data allowing drag-and-drop visualisation and access to hazard, environment and infrastructure layers across the Pacific.

name: Pacific Environment Data Portal (SPREP)
operator: Secretariat of the Pacific Regional Environment Programme (SPREP)
dataType: Environmental datasets, GIS layers, biodiversity, climate, waste, oceans
description: SPREP's regional environment portal connecting 14 national environment portals and hosting GIS datasets, digital atlases and monitoring data for the Pacific region.

name: SPC Geoscience, Energy and Maritime Division (GEM)
dataType: Geoscience, hazard maps, bathymetry, coastal surveys, energy resources
description: SPC's geoscience division (formerly SOPAC) providing geological surveys, coastal hazard maps, bathymetry and energy resource data across the Pacific region.

name: PacRIS - Pacific Risk Information System
dataType: Hazard maps, exposure databases, earthquake/cyclone catalogues, building inventory
description: Largest Pacific geospatial hazard collection with 115,000 earthquake and 2,500 cyclone events, 5 million geo-referenced buildings and country-specific risk models.

name: Digital Earth Pacific (DEP)
dataType: Satellite-derived coastline change, mangrove extent, water observations, land cover
description: SPC's operational earth observation platform built on Microsoft Planetary Computer, providing satellite-derived coastline, mangrove, water and land cover products for 22 Pacific nations.

name: PacificDEM - Pacific Islands Digital Elevation Models
dataType: LiDAR-derived DEMs, topobathymetric models for Pacific island nations
description: High-resolution LiDAR-derived elevation models for Pacific island nations developed by SPC and NIWA under the PARTneR project for climate hazard risk modelling.

name: PopGIS - SPC Population and Census Mapping
operator: Pacific Community (SPC) - Statistics for Development Division
dataType: Census population grids, demographic indicators, administrative boundaries
description: SPC's web mapping tool for visualising Pacific Island census data at enumeration-area level, enabling population and demographic spatial analysis across the region.

name: NTLIS - Northern Territory Location Information Strategy
operator: Northern Territory Government (Dept. of Infrastructure, Planning and Logistics)
dataType: Cadastre, topography, imagery, land tenure, native title, environment
description: Northern Territory's spatial data infrastructure providing cadastre, topographic, imagery and land tenure datasets through the NR Maps web viewer.

name: ACTmapi - ACT Government Spatial Portal
operator: ACT Government (Environment, Planning and Sustainable Development)
dataType: Planning zones, cadastre, heritage, environment, transport
description: Australian Capital Territory's web mapping portal providing planning zones, cadastre, heritage sites, environmental and transport spatial layers for the ACT.

name: Koordinates - NZ Geospatial Data Platform
operator: Koordinates (hosting NZ government and agency data)
dataType: Multi-source geospatial data including NZ councils, government agencies
description: New Zealand-based geospatial data platform hosting and serving spatial layers from NZ government agencies, regional councils and international sources.

name: SPC Microdata Library
operator: Pacific Community (SPC) - Statistics for Development Division
dataType: Household surveys, census microdata, economic surveys with geographic identifiers
description: SPC's curated library of Pacific Island household and economic survey microdata with geographic identifiers enabling subnational spatial analysis.
